consumption: vendored (copied into repo; not submodule/pip — see scripts/sync_qpgf.py)
policy: Manual, deliberate sync only. Oracle code/deps changes can alter seal u_hash/signature (oracle_fingerprint is bound into every seal). Any upgrade is a semver-gated event verified by `python scripts/sync_qpgf.py check` (seal u_hash invariance) before commit.
